queries:
SELECT COALESCE(p.column_name, u.column_name) AS column_name,
                   p.ordinal_position, u.ordinal_position, p.data_type, u.data_type
            FROM (SELECT * FROM PROD_DB.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
                  WHERE table_schema = 'BI' AND table_name = 'RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW') p
            FULL JOIN (SELECT * FROM UAT_DB.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
                  WHERE table_schema = 'BI' AND table_name = 'RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW') u
              ON p.column_name = u.column_name
            WHERE p.column_name IS NULL OR u.column_name IS NULL
               OR p.ordinal_position != u.ordinal_position
               OR p.data_type != u.data_type
            ORDER BY COALESCE(p.ordinal_position, u.ordinal_position)

SELECT p.n, u.n, p.n - u.n
            FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region) p,
                 (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region) u

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", COUNT(*) AS n FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW
                GROUP BY ALL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
                ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", COUNT(*) AS n FROM UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW
                GROUP BY ALL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
                ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 100

T3.cte:
WITH prod AS (SELECT t."Interview ID" AS "Interview ID",
       t."REQUISITION_ID" AS "REQUISITION_ID",
       t."JOB_APPLICATION_ID" AS "JOB_APPLICATION_ID",
       t."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID" AS "INTERVIEWER_USER_ID",
       t."INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID" AS "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Title", '') AS "Interview Title",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Status", '') AS "Interview Status",
       t."Interview Modified Date" AS "Interview Modified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Guide Title", '') AS "Interview Guide Title",
       t."Interview Is Notified" AS "Interview Is Notified",
       t."Interview Notified Date" AS "Interview Notified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Subject", '') AS "Interview Subject",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Email", '') AS "Interview Email",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Timezone", '') AS "Interview Timezone",
       t."Interview Due Date" AS "Interview Due Date",
       t."Interview End Date" AS "Interview End Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Interviewer", '') AS "Interview Interviewer",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME"
       FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region),
     uat AS (SELECT t."Interview ID" AS "Interview ID",
       t."REQUISITION_ID" AS "REQUISITION_ID",
       t."JOB_APPLICATION_ID" AS "JOB_APPLICATION_ID",
       t."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID" AS "INTERVIEWER_USER_ID",
       t."INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID" AS "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Title", '') AS "Interview Title",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Status", '') AS "Interview Status",
       t."Interview Modified Date" AS "Interview Modified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Guide Title", '') AS "Interview Guide Title",
       t."Interview Is Notified" AS "Interview Is Notified",
       t."Interview Notified Date" AS "Interview Notified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Subject", '') AS "Interview Subject",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Email", '') AS "Interview Email",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Timezone", '') AS "Interview Timezone",
       t."Interview Due Date" AS "Interview Due Date",
       t."Interview End Date" AS "Interview End Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Interviewer", '') AS "Interview Interviewer",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME"
       FROM UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region)

PLEASE RESPOND – Interview Invitation for African Australian Inclusion Program
PLEASE RESPOND – Interview Invitation for African Australian Inclusion Program

Dear Agnes Congratulations on reaching the next stage of the recruitment process for the position of Advisor, The Village - (AAIP2019MELB209) in the African Australian Inclusion Program. Please find below the important information regarding your Interview: Date – Friday 4th October 2019 Time – 9.45am to 10.30am Location – Room 03.112 at 700 Bourke St​. Melbourne. (Please note, if you are applying from interstate, it is not a requirement for you to attend the interview in person. Please confirm if you would like to interview via Skype when you RSVP for your interview). CONTACT ON DAY: Please contact one of our team members on info@corporatediversity.org.au or 03 9421 7600 Within 24 hours, please confirm receipt of this email and confirmation of your attendance at the interview by sending an email to info@corporatediversity.org.au If you do not RSVP, we will assume you do not wish to continue with your application. During this recruitment process we need to be able to contact you so please keep your phone on and monitor your emails closely. FINAL: Please check travel times when planning for your interview so as to allow enough time if there is heavy traffic or delays with public transport. We recommend you arrive 15 minutes before the above scheduled interview time. ONLINE TESTING As part of the recruitment process, all candidates are required to complete online testing specific to the role they have applied for. What do I need to do before I get started? • Use a PC or Mac with Mozilla Firefox or Internet Explorer installed. • Disable any pop-up blockers- for example, Google or Yahoo Toolbar. • To give yourself the best opportunity to do well on the assessment, we recommend that you complete the assessment in a quiet area where you will be free of interruptions. 1. Online Abilities Assessment - this test will give us and the NAB Hiring Manager an insight in to your problem solving and analytical skills, which are critical skills for this role. You will have 48 hours to complete this assessment, and it will take approximately 45 minutes . To register yourself for testing: 1. Click on link https://nab.maptq.com/nab/home/en/register 2. Enter ALL personal details 3. Enter Access Code: AAIP@Careers 4. Check the box to accept the terms of agreement 5. Click SAVE Once you have registered as per the above instructions, you will receive an email from Corporate Diversity Partnerships to complete your online test. Please check your junk mail/spam folder if you do not receive this email. If you experience any technical difficulties including starting, accessing or completing the assessments please email nab@cut-e.com outlining the nature of your query. 2. Excel test - Shortly you will receive a separate email from Testgrid with instructions on how to complete the Excel online testing. Please complete the online testing within 48 hours of receiving the email. Should you have issues accessing the test, please contact the Testgrid team directly via support@testgrid.com . Please note you only need to complete the Online Abilities Assessment test once. If you have already completed this test as part of recruitment for another AAIP role, you can disregard. Any other online AAIP test (e.g. Excel) you receive will be specific to the role you have applied for and you are required to complete. If you are unable to gain access to the internet during the time periods required for your tests, please let Jesuit Social Services know as soon as possible at info@corporatediversity.org.au . PREPARING FOR YOUR INTERVIEW: You are invited to attend a NAB B.E.I Skills Workshop. Often past behaviour is an excellent predictor of future performance so we use an interview technique called Behavioural Event Interviewing (BEI). To help you understand more about the process, NAB is running a BEI Skills Workshop. We encourage you to attend. The workshop is not compulsory but will be helpful to you. Please find attached some information to assist you in preparing for your interview. Date: Thursday 19 September 2019 Time: 9:00am to 12:00pm Where: The Bowl, The Academy - NAB, 500 Bourke Street, Melbourne R.S.V.P: Book your place at the Workshop by clicking here Thank you and should you have any questions, please feel free to email Corporate Diversity Partnerships at Jesuit Social Services - info@corporatediversity.org.au

You will be meeting with Audra McElwee (Branch Manager), Gareth Herman (Sales Operations Coordinator) and Pamela Sinclair (Human Resources Manager). Upon arrival, please enter the branch and ask for Audra McElwee who will come to greet you. Please ensure you complete the EQ Survey at your earliest convenience (this will be reviewed by the panel prior to your interview). The EQ Survey should be emailed to you from an external provider within the next 48 hours - please check your Junk mail. We encourage you to take some time to visit the Summerland Credit Union website at www.summerland.com.au and prepare any questions you may have for us. We look forward to meeting with you. Kind regards Human Resources

Good Afternoon Michelle, As discussed, I am pleased to invite you to attend an interview for the role of Customer Service Officer on 4 th September at 10:30am Further details are below: Address: Singleton Visitor Information and Enterprise Centre – 23 Maitland Road, Singleton. Ask for me at reception. Interviewer/s: Brendon Burness - Team Leader Customer Service, Shaina Way – Senior Customer Service Officer, Carissa Starr – Project & Systems Officer Singleton Council uses the STAR interview technique. The STAR (Situation, Task, Action, Result) technique is used to gather all the relevant information about a specific capability that the job requires. Each question will rely on you providing an example as part of your answer. Some tips on this style of interviewing are below; Situation: The interviewer wants you to present a recent challenge and situation in which you found yourself Task: What did you have to achieve? The interviewer will be looking to see what you were trying to achieve from the situation Action: What did you do? The interviewer will be looking for information on what you did, why you did it and what the alternatives were Results: What was the outcome of your actions? What did you achieve through your actions and did you meet your objectives? What did you learn from this experience and have you used this learning since? Please do not hesitate to contact me should you have any questions.

Dear Cat, Further to our recent telephone conversation I would like to confirm your interview details for the above position. Time: 10:00am Date: 2 December 2019 Location: 200 Tuam Street, Christchurch 8011 Room: Rakaia Interview Panel: Caroline Hart; David Perenara-O’Connel; Erica Henderson Interviews are conducted by a panel, usually 3 people. All interviewees are asked the same questions, to ensure all are treated fairly. We include behavioural type questions, using the STARR technique, which asks you to give examples of what you have done in situations similar to those you will encounter in the new position. S/T - Provide a Situation or a Task that you have encountered A - Explain the Actions you took R - Outline the Results or changes caused by these actions R - The role you had in this situation/task Should you require any further information please do not hesitate to contact me on 0800 322656 or via Customer Services on (03) 353 9007. Kind Regards Mariana Villambrosa Human Resources Administrator

Dear Anna, As discussed, you will be meeting with Bernard Grace for a site interview at the UNSW. Date and time: Friday 08 th February 2019 at 11:00AM. Please wear Corporate attire for the interview. Please ensure you bring your licences and certificates to the interview. Please use the attached checklist to ensure you have the correct documents. • Updated copy of your CV / Resume • Security Licence • Driver’s Licence • Security Operations Certificate (Certificate II in Security Operations is the minimum) • First Aid Certificate • Evidence of your entitlement to work in Australia, e.g. Birth Certificate, Passport, Citizenship Certificate As discussed if you are successful in the interview process you will also eventually need an RSA, WWCC, NPC and mental health training which we will help obtain. Please call Bernard on your arrival on 0418 658 184 Kind Regards The Recruitment Team

queries:
WITH prod AS (SELECT t."Interview ID" AS "Interview ID",
       t."REQUISITION_ID" AS "REQUISITION_ID",
       t."JOB_APPLICATION_ID" AS "JOB_APPLICATION_ID",
       t."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID" AS "INTERVIEWER_USER_ID",
       t."INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID" AS "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Title", '') AS "Interview Title",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Status", '') AS "Interview Status",
       t."Interview Modified Date" AS "Interview Modified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Guide Title", '') AS "Interview Guide Title",
       t."Interview Is Notified" AS "Interview Is Notified",
       t."Interview Notified Date" AS "Interview Notified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Subject", '') AS "Interview Subject",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Email", '') AS "Interview Email",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Timezone", '') AS "Interview Timezone",
       t."Interview Due Date" AS "Interview Due Date",
       t."Interview End Date" AS "Interview End Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Interviewer", '') AS "Interview Interviewer",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME"
       FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region),
     uat AS (SELECT t."Interview ID" AS "Interview ID",
       t."REQUISITION_ID" AS "REQUISITION_ID",
       t."JOB_APPLICATION_ID" AS "JOB_APPLICATION_ID",
       t."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID" AS "INTERVIEWER_USER_ID",
       t."INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID" AS "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Title", '') AS "Interview Title",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Status", '') AS "Interview Status",
       t."Interview Modified Date" AS "Interview Modified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Guide Title", '') AS "Interview Guide Title",
       t."Interview Is Notified" AS "Interview Is Notified",
       t."Interview Notified Date" AS "Interview Notified Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Subject", '') AS "Interview Subject",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Email", '') AS "Interview Email",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Timezone", '') AS "Interview Timezone",
       t."Interview Due Date" AS "Interview Due Date",
       t."Interview End Date" AS "Interview End Date",
       NULLIF(t."Interview Interviewer", '') AS "Interview Interviewer",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_REGION", '') AS "CLIENT_REGION",
       NULLIF(t."CLIENT_NAME", '') AS "CLIENT_NAME"
       FROM UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW t  INNER JOIN UAT_DB.BI.TEMP_ACTIVE_TENANTS AS act ON t.client_name = act.client_name AND t.client_region = act.client_region)
SELECT 'in_prod_not_uat' AS direction, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM prod EXCEPT SELECT * FROM uat)
UNION ALL

T4.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS shared_keys,
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."REQUISITION_ID", u."REQUISITION_ID")) AS "REQUISITION_ID",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."JOB_APPLICATION_ID", u."JOB_APPLICATION_ID")) AS "JOB_APPLICATION_ID",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID", u."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID")) AS "INTERVIEWER_USER_ID",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Title",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Title",''))) AS "Interview Title",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Status",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Status",''))) AS "Interview Status",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Modified Date", u."Interview Modified Date")) AS "Interview Modified Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Guide Title",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Guide Title",''))) AS "Interview Guide Title",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Is Notified", u."Interview Is Notified")) AS "Interview Is Notified",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Notified Date", u."Interview Notified Date")) AS "Interview Notified Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Subject",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Subject",''))) AS "Interview Subject",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Email",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Email",''))) AS "Interview Email",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Timezone",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Timezone",''))) AS "Interview Timezone",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Due Date", u."Interview Due Date")) AS "Interview Due Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview End Date", u."Interview End Date")) AS "Interview End Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Interviewer",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Interviewer",''))) AS "Interview Interviewer"
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")

Hi Baba, 


 


This email is to confirm your interview for the position of Support Worker with Ermha. Please find below details of the interview. 


 



 






Date 






Tuesday 14th January 2020 








Time 






10:00am 








Duration 






Approx. 1 hour 








Location 






Ermha Epping Office 


(located in the Epping Community Hub) 


713 High Street, Epping 3076 








Meeting with 






Alwyn Holt (Practice Leader) & Tasi Lemi (Lead Support Worker) 









 


The interview will cover questions relating to your interest and experience in this role and will include competency-based questions where you will be asked to talk through examples from your past.

If you have any queries, please call me on 03 9767 1727. 


 
 


Kind regards, 


 
 


Sarah Waite 


Talent Acquisition Advisor

Good afternoon Jeremy,
As discussed, I am pleased to invite you to attend an interview for the role of Information Systems Help Desk Officer on 1st February  at 9am.
Further details are below:
Address: Singleton Council Administration Building – Civic Centre, 12-14 Queen Street Singleton NSW. Council is on the corner of Queen & Civic Streets, turn down Civic & park in the car park at the rear of the building & enter through main reception area. Ask for me at reception.
Interviewer/s: 
John Harding, Information Systems Coordinator
Mark Wiblen, Manager Corporate and Community Services
Alex Theaker, Business Support Coordinator
Singleton Council uses the STAR interview technique. The STAR (Situation, Task, Action, Result) technique is used to gather all the relevant information about a specific capability that the job requires.
Each question will rely on you providing an example as part of your answer.
Some tips on this style of interviewing are below;

Situation: The interviewer wants you to present a recent challenge and situation in which you found yourself
Task: What did you have to achieve? The interviewer will be looking to see what you were trying to achieve from the situation
Action: What did you do? The interviewer will be looking for information on what you did, why you did it and what the alternatives were
Results: What was the outcome of your actions? What did you achieve through your actions and did you meet your objectives? What did you learn from this experience and have you used this learning since?

Please do not hesitate to contact me should you have any questions.

queries:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS shared_keys,
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."REQUISITION_ID", u."REQUISITION_ID")) AS "REQUISITION_ID",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."JOB_APPLICATION_ID", u."JOB_APPLICATION_ID")) AS "JOB_APPLICATION_ID",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID", u."INTERVIEWER_USER_ID")) AS "INTERVIEWER_USER_ID",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Title",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Title",''))) AS "Interview Title",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Status",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Status",''))) AS "Interview Status",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Modified Date", u."Interview Modified Date")) AS "Interview Modified Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Guide Title",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Guide Title",''))) AS "Interview Guide Title",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Is Notified", u."Interview Is Notified")) AS "Interview Is Notified",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Notified Date", u."Interview Notified Date")) AS "Interview Notified Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Subject",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Subject",''))) AS "Interview Subject",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Email",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Email",''))) AS "Interview Email",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Timezone",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Timezone",''))) AS "Interview Timezone",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Due Date", u."Interview Due Date")) AS "Interview Due Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview End Date", u."Interview End Date")) AS "Interview End Date",
       COUNT_IF(NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Interviewer",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Interviewer",''))) AS "Interview Interviewer"
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Email" AS prod_value, u."Interview Email" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Email",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Email",''))
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Due Date" AS prod_value, u."Interview Due Date" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Due Date", u."Interview Due Date")
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Modified Date" AS prod_value, u."Interview Modified Date" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Modified Date", u."Interview Modified Date")
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Status" AS prod_value, u."Interview Status" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Status",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Status",''))
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview End Date" AS prod_value, u."Interview End Date" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview End Date", u."Interview End Date")
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Interviewer" AS prod_value, u."Interview Interviewer" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Interviewer",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Interviewer",''))
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Notified Date" AS prod_value, u."Interview Notified Date" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(p."Interview Notified Date", u."Interview Notified Date")
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Timezone" AS prod_value, u."Interview Timezone" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
WHERE NOT EQUAL_NULL(NULLIF(p."Interview Timezone",''), NULLIF(u."Interview Timezone",''))
LIMIT 5

SELECT "Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION", p."Interview Is Notified" AS prod_value, u."Interview Is Notified" AS uat_value
FROM PROD_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW p
JOIN UAT_DB.BI.RECRUITMENT_APPLICATION_INTERVIEW u USING ("Interview ID", "INTERVIEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID", "CLIENT_NAME", "CLIENT_REGION")
